# Amoris

> Amoris is an Indian AI agency that builds and deploys named AI employees — voice agents, chat assistants, knowledge workers, and operating systems — for businesses across India and Southeast Asia.

## What Amoris does

Amoris builds custom AI agents scoped to specific business roles. Each agent has a defined job, a deployment timeline of 3–4 weeks, and operates 24/7. Not generic "AI consulting" — specific, named employees with bounded scope.

## AI Employees (18 total, across 5 divisions)

### Voice Employees
- AI Receptionist: answers inbound calls 24/7 in 6 languages, books appointments, never misses a call
- AI Booking Assistant: inbound scheduling and confirmations via voice
- AI Voice Sales Agent: outbound lead calling, qualification, and meeting booking
- AI Collections Caller: automated payment reminders and follow-up calls

### Chat Employees
- AI WhatsApp Assistant: handles orders, support, payments on WhatsApp — resolves 80% of queries without a human
- AI Support Assistant: website and chat support automation
- AI Lead Qualifier: scores and qualifies every inbound lead instantly
- AI Social Responder: Instagram DM and social inbox automation

### Knowledge Employees
- AI Company Brain: all company knowledge (SOPs, policies, docs) searchable by any employee instantly
- AI Document Analyst: contract and document intelligence
- AI Help Desk: internal IT and HR helpdesk automation
- AI Compliance Assistant: regulatory and compliance Q&A

### Sales Employees
- AI Prospector: lead research and list building
- AI Outreach Rep: personalised outreach sequences
- AI Sales Coordinator: CRM updates and pipeline management

### Operations Employees
- AI Business Analyst: reporting and data analysis automation
- AI Back-Office Clerk: invoice data entry and document processing
- AI Recruiter: JD writing, candidate screening, interview scheduling

## AIOS — AI Operating System

All 18 AI employees deployed together with shared memory, cross-agent workflows, and one command centre. Scoped per company size.

## Pricing

- Simple chat agents: ₹20,000–₹50,000 setup
- Voice, knowledge, sales, operations agents: custom pricing (scoped on audit call)
- AIOS: custom pricing
- Clear quote given before any commitment. No "contact for pricing" black holes.

## How to hire an AI employee

1. Book a free 30-minute audit call at https://amoris.in/contact
2. Amoris scopes the right agent and gives a price on the call
3. Build and deployment: 3–4 weeks
4. Agent operates 24/7 after go-live

## Languages supported

Hindi, English, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi (voice agents)

## Key differentiators

- Named agents with specific scopes — not vague "AI solutions"
- 6 Indian languages for voice agents
- 3–4 week deployment timeline
- India-built, globally deployable
- Clear pricing before commitment
